markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy Focus:** Content will now target pilot customers—companies providing Otto to employees for self-managed travel—to support a new sales initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Performance is Healthy:** Organic search average position improved from 16 to 9, and traffic has fully recovered from a holiday dip.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Key Pillar is Strong:** The "Travel Disruption & Optimization" content pillar is a top performer, directly aligning with Otto's core value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [**2026 Planning Set:** A dedicated strategy session is scheduled for **Feb 5th** to define 2026 goals and integrate the new ICP into the content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Topics

### New Strategic Focus: Pilot Customers

  - [**Objective:** Attract companies for a pilot program where employees self-manage travel using Otto.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Ideal Customer Profile (ICP):**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Size:** Any size, from a 20-person company to a 20-person team within a large enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Need:** Companies at an inflection point where operational pain points from growth make them receptive to new travel solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Exclusion:** Companies with fully managed, mandatory booking systems are not a fit.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [GrowthX will research and develop a new topic cluster to target this ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [This may require multiple personas, as messaging for a small company differs from that for an enterprise team.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Content & Technical Status

  - [**Content Pipeline:** Healthy topic runway.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Auto-Publishing:** Minor technical snag generating FAQs; no impact on content delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**404 Errors:** GrowthX to investigate two 404s in Google Search Console, which Jason did not intentionally create.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [**Indexing:** Eight new posts are "discovered, not indexed." This is normal for a new site with low authority; GrowthX will monitor the time-to-index metric.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Performance Review

  - [**Organic Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Average position improved from 16 to 9.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Healthy traffic distribution across multiple posts, not reliant on one.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - ["Travel Disruption & Optimization" is a top performer, validating its alignment with Otto's core value.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Dropped from 25% to 16% due to a Scrunch tracking update, not a performance issue.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [All clients saw proportional drops.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
      - [Fully recovered from the holiday dip, now exceeding pre-holiday levels.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [Investigate the two 404 errors.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [Send the agenda for the Feb 5th strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Confirm Michael's attendance for the Feb 5th session.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Define the conversion event before the next meeting to support new landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2Lj1hFjy_Wa7Gs2x1FLpzxuNBU5JR7vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
